name: 规则与法律
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 社会组织 / Social Organization / Social Organization
curriculum_points: Students will be able to analyze the purpose of rules and laws in different contexts (school, community) and explain the consequences of following or not following them. (Age 7-9)
Students will be able to demonstrate an understanding of how rules and laws are created and changed to promote fairness, safety, and order in a society.
